title: Xtra Crispy Japanese Baby New Potatoes Mochi
description: A crispy and savory Japanese dish featuring baby new potatoes in a mochi form, perfect for a solo dinner, with a grassy and high-protein-friendly flavor profile, served in a stone bowl dolsot.
instructions: Preheat the stone bowl dolsot over medium heat.
In a large bowl, combine mochi flour and water, and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces and shape each piece into a small ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place a halved baby new potato in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the potato to form a triangle or a square shape, and press the edges to seal.
Brush the tops of the mochi with sesame oil and cook in the preheated stone bowl dolsot for 5 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
Serve the crispy mochi with grated daikon, green onions, and a drizzle of soy sauce.
